data.title: Trend Research- Ethereum's major player, buys 46,379 ETH, now ranks among top ETH treasuries, below SharpLink and BitMine.
data.description: After acquiring 46,379 ETH, Trend Research has jumped into a top position among ETH treasuries, ranking behind only SharpLink Gaming and BitMine Immersion Technologies in terms of holdings.

data.title: 11th Global Tourism Economy Forum in Harbin, China concluded with success. Theme: "New Quality Productive Forces".
data.description: The 11th Global Tourism Economy Forum • Heilongjiang 2025 held in Harbin, China, successfully wrapped up with the focus on "New Quality Productive Forces" powering the global tourism economy. This event attracted attention worldwide and featured discussions on advancing the tourism industry, with a special emphasis on highlighting innovative strategies and technologies. Key figures from the tourism sector, including government officials, industry leaders, and experts, gathered to exchange ideas on promoting sustainable and inclusive tourism growth. With a record attendance of over 1,000 participants, the forum provided a platform for networking and collaboration to drive positive changes in the tourism sector.

data.title: NANOscientific Symposium Series 2025 ends with celebration of 40 years of AFM at Stanford, bringing together global nanoscale community.
data.description: Recently in Stanford, the NANOscientific Symposium Series (NSS) 2025 successfully wrapped up its global program, uniting the nanoscale science and metrology community worldwide. This year-long series brought together experts and professionals from the Americas, Europe, and Asia, highlighting advancements in the field.

data.title: HashKey Capital raises $250M in commitments for fourth crypto fund, indicating high institutional interest despite market volatility.
data.description: HashKey Capital has secured $250 million in commitments for the initial closure of its fourth cryptocurrency fund, showcasing ongoing interest from institutional investors despite market fluctuations.

data.title: Accenture to strengthen Financial Services in Italy by acquiring Cabel Industry from Fibonacci Group.
data.description: In EMPOLI, Italy, global company Accenture recently announced a new deal with the Fibonacci Group to purchase Cabel Industry.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent seeks Federal Reserve Chair to shrink institution, end QE; criticizes wealth gap.
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is conducting interviews for the next Federal Reserve Chair, aiming for someone committed to reducing the central bank's influence and ending perpetual quantitative easing. During an economic review podcast, Bessent criticized the Fed's policies over the past 15 years, particularly the large-scale asset purchases post-2008 financial crisis. He deemed the Fed as an "engine of inequality" for exacerbating the wealth gap with policies favoring asset holders over others, leading to a two-tier economy. Bessent suggested that the Fed's low interest rates and asset purchases benefited the wealthy more than the general population. He advocated for a retraction of these policies to restore economic fairness.

data.title: LDO expected to reach $0.75-$0.85 in 4-6 weeks with bullish signals from MACD. Technical analysis projects recovery.
data.description: Recent technical analysis of LDO indicates positive momentum, with the MACD histogram showing a bullish trend.
